title: ECHS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 09 Dental Officer, Nursing Assistant and Other Posts
description: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has declared the official notification for 09 Officers in Charge, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Medical Officer, Nursing Assistants, and Other Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Any Degree, MBBS, BDS, D.Pharm, GNM, Diploma, 08th, 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the ECHS Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these p...
